integration_evidence.summary: smoke:packaged:runtime sets WEBENVOY_REQUIRE_PACKAGED_RUNTIME=1 so missing Core/Harbor runtime assets fail closed instead of warning-only success.
Unavailable runtime repair text distinguishes disabled packaged launch from missing packaged assets and points to runtime env overrides or rebuilding with packaged assets.
Local-only smoke creates a Harbor identity, reads back a Harbor live identity projection, opens a runtime session, and verifies the session ref flows into Core task result/evidence/session refs.
Screenshot artifact records packaged runtime smoke UI state. It is local runtime evidence only, not live site/browser evidence.
